background: The Irish Department of Health recommends a reading level of 12 to 14 years of age for health information leaflets aimed at the public. Table 3.1 lists reading levels for n = 46 Irish health care Web sites.

task.query: Assess whether the reading levels of the Irish health care Web sites meet the recommended reading level of 12 to 14 years of age.
